title: Consolidated Broader Advisory Rollout Report — Final Decision
final_decision_rationale: All safety gates passed. Blocked-status advisory validated (escalate_blocked, 0 violations). 40/40 cycles enriched with advisory in activation mode (30 failed + 10 blocked). Monitoring mode confirmed silent. In-scope coverage = 100%. Decision: enable_selected_advisory_reports. Flag remains required (NOT globally enabled). No auto-execution. No mandatory gate. Rollback immediate.
summary: EPIC #898 complete. blocked validated. 40 cycles enriched. 0 violations. monitoring_mode_silent=True. Final decision: enable_selected_advisory_reports. No auto-execution. Flag required.

findings.finding: Blocked-status advisory validated: 10/10 cycles get escalate_blocked (high confidence)
40/40 cycles enriched with advisory in activation mode (30 failed + 10 blocked), 0 violations
Monitoring mode confirmed silent: 0 advisory surfaced when monitoring_only=True
In-scope coverage rate = 100% — all failed+blocked cycles receive advisory
Only 2 actions exercised on real+synthetic data (continue_from_partial_progress, escalate_blocked)

recommendations.recommendation: Enable advisory for mission_execution and diagnostic reports via ADVISORY_ROLLOUT_ENABLED=true
recommendations.rationale: Safe, advisory-only, reversible. Validated on failed+blocked status.

recommendations.recommendation: Do NOT enable globally by default — flag remains required
recommendations.rationale: Only 2 of 9 recovery templates exercised. Broader coverage needed before global default.

recommendations.recommendation: Do NOT auto-execute any advisory recommendation
recommendations.rationale: Recommendations are advisory. Human action always required.
